evidence_note: Heterochromatin/silencing factor; 1 immune pub, no ChEMBL target, 0 trials. Essentially unstudied as an immune target.
gwas_traits: Thyroid stimulating hormone levels (p=2e-38, rs1659563) - thyroid FUNCTION not autoimmunity
on_target_liability: Broadly expressed heterochromatin-assembly factor, LoF-intolerant (pLI 0.998, LOEUF 0.46). Ubiquitous chromatin regulator — systemic inhibition risks broad effects.

evidence_note: E3 ubiquitin ligase, canonical TCR brake; ChEMBL target CHEMBL4879459; active CBL-B inhibitor IO programs (NX-1607 NCT05107674; NCT05662397). 233 immune pubs. Hot IO target.
gwas_traits: Hypothyroidism (p=3e-41, rs1921445); Autoimmune thyroid disease (OR 1.1, p=7e-19, rs57512118); MS; Hashimoto
on_target_liability: Constrained E3 ligase (pLI 1.0, LOEUF 0.40), broadly expressed at moderate levels. Canonical T-cell brake; KO mice viable but autoimmune-prone — on-target autoimmunity risk. Well-precedented immuno-oncology target (Cbl-b inhibitors in trials).

evidence_note: T-cell surface CD6; ChEMBL target CHEMBL3712853; itolizumab (Ph3, approved India psoriasis/GvHD) + oncolysin CD6; 9 trials. Established immune target.
gwas_traits: Multiple sclerosis (p=2e-29, rs4939490); IBD; ankylosing spondylitis; Crohn; Graves; psoriasis
on_target_liability: T-cell-surface scavenger-receptor, spleen/blood-restricted (lineage enriched). LoF-tolerant (pLI 0, LOEUF 0.88). Cell-surface, immune-restricted, drugged (itolizumab / CD6-axis biologics). CAVEAT: GTEx is a resting/bulk-tissue survey; this receptor is activation-inducible, so low off-tissue TPM reflects the resting state only, not an activated-state safety negative.

evidence_note: Chloride channel CLIC-like 1; 1 immune pub, no ChEMBL target, 0 trials. No prior immune-target work.
gwas_traits: none (no immune GWAS; OT top = Chudley-McCullough deafness syndrome)
on_target_liability: Broadly expressed ER chloride channel involved in ER homeostasis; HPA flags essential (gnomAD LoF-tolerant, pLI 0, LOEUF 0.81). Biallelic LOF → retinitis pigmentosa; also linked to ER-stress/neurodegeneration. Ubiquitous, recessive-disease liability.

evidence_note: Type-I IFN receptor; ChEMBL target CHEMBL1887; anifrolumab APPROVED (max_phase 4, Saphnelo/lupus), 50 trials. Established drug target.
gwas_traits: Hypothyroidism (p=4e-15, rs969478); OT MS 0.61 / SLE 0.58; (IL10RB pQTLs are neighbour-gene mapping)
on_target_liability: Type I IFN receptor on essentially all nucleated cells (broad GTEx). LoF-tolerant (pLI 0, LOEUF 0.97) but on-target blockade → impaired antiviral immunity (anifrolumab precedent). Ubiquitous surface receptor.

evidence_note: Integrator complex subunit 6; ChEMBL target entry CHEMBL5724659 exists but NO mechanisms/drugs; 0 immune pubs, 0 trials. Registered protein, no program.
on_target_liability: Core subunit of the Integrator complex (snRNA 3'-end processing, RNAPII pause release). Broadly expressed, HPA-flagged essential, pLI 1.0, LOEUF 0.23. Broadly essential multiprotein complex.

evidence_note: PHD-finger E3 ligase (HBO1 complex); 0 immune pubs, no ChEMBL target, 0 trials. Unstudied as a target.
on_target_liability: Broadly expressed incl. brain; highly LoF-intolerant (pLI 1.0, LOEUF 0.24, lof_z 6.7). Component of a histone-acetyltransferase complex — chromatin machinery, broad essentiality signal.

evidence_note: PTIP chromatin adaptor, known role in Ig class-switch recombination; 43 target-context pubs but NO ChEMBL target, NO drug program, NO trials. Known immune biology, undrugged.
gwas_traits: Psoriatic arthritis vs cutaneous psoriasis (p=4e-6, suggestive)
on_target_liability: Broadly expressed incl. brain; among the most LoF-intolerant here (pLI 1.0, LOEUF 0.20, lof_z 8.7). Scaffolds a histone-methyltransferase complex and DDR — broadly essential chromatin/genome-maintenance factor.

evidence_note: Rho-family GTPase, established immune regulator (RAC2 immunodeficiency); ChEMBL target CHEMBL5581; 73 immune pubs; NCT05537610 (gene therapy for RAC2 deficiency). Well-characterized immune biology, not novel.
on_target_liability: Hematopoietic-restricted Rho GTPase but strongly LoF-intolerant (pLI 1.0, LOEUF 0.20). Germline variants cause immunodeficiency/neutrophil dysfunction — on-target hematopoietic essentiality despite tissue-restricted expression.

evidence_note: U2 snRNP spliceosome protein; ChEMBL target entry CHEMBL5725125 but NO mechanisms/drugs; 2 immune pubs, 0 trials. No program.
on_target_liability: Core U2 snRNP spliceosomal protein — broadly essential for pre-mRNA splicing. HPA flags essential; gnomAD LoF-tolerant (pLI 0.001, LOEUF 0.92) reflects short haplosufficient gene, NOT dispensability. Core spliceosome.

evidence_note: TatD DNase domain protein; 0 immune pubs, no ChEMBL target, 0 trials. Essentially uncharacterized as a target.
gwas_traits: none (no immune GWAS; 0/20 gene-mapped associations immune)
on_target_liability: Broadly expressed putative nuclease, LoF-tolerant (pLI 0, LOEUF 0.94). No strong essentiality signal, but ubiquitous expression means limited tissue selectivity for a systemic agent.

evidence_note: 4-1BB/CD137 costimulatory receptor; ChEMBL target CHEMBL3712857 with agonist antibodies urelumab (Ph2) & utomilumab (Ph3); 18+17 trials. Classic immuno-oncology target, absent from authors' table only.
gwas_traits: Rheumatoid arthritis (p=3e-9); Autoimmune hypothyroidism (p=3e-8); Psoriasis; SLE; T1D
on_target_liability: Cell-surface costimulatory receptor on activated T/NK; expression blood/spleen/lymphocyte-restricted, very low TPM elsewhere. LoF-tolerant (pLI 0.003, LOEUF 0.84). Clinically drugged (urelumab/utomilumab agonists). CAVEAT: GTEx is a resting/bulk-tissue survey; this receptor is activation-inducible, so low off-tissue TPM reflects the resting state only, not an activated-state safety negative.

evidence_note: tRNA isopentenyltransferase; 2 immune pubs, no ChEMBL target, 0 drug trials (gene-intervention hits are spurious string matches). No target work.
gwas_traits: White blood cell count (p=1e-10, rs6700363) - quantitative only
on_target_liability: Broadly expressed cyto+mito tRNA-modification enzyme. gnomAD LoF-tolerant (pLI 0, LOEUF 1.08) but biallelic LOF causes mitochondrial disease (COXPD/encephalopathy). Housekeeping enzyme; recessive disease liability.

evidence_note: Twinfilin actin-binding protein; 1 immune pub, no ChEMBL target, 0 trials. Unstudied as an immune target.
on_target_liability: Broadly expressed cytoskeletal (actin) regulator, LoF-intolerant (pLI 0.998, LOEUF 0.46). Ubiquitous housekeeping function — systemic inhibition liability.

evidence_note: Ubiquitin-related modifier / tRNA thiolation; 0 immune pubs, no ChEMBL target, no mechanisms, 0 trials. No prior target work in T cells.
gwas_traits: none (no immune GWAS; OT top = type-2 diabetes, metabolic)
on_target_liability: Broadly expressed sulfur-carrier for tRNA wobble thiolation (housekeeping). HPA flags essential; gnomAD LoF-tolerant (pLI 0.005, LOEUF 1.03) but the gene is short/low-power so tolerance is weak evidence. Conflicting essentiality signal.
